name: io.github.atheris-ee/atheris-mcp
description: Country-targeted mobile and residential proxy egress for agents: live stock, ready-to-use proxy URLs, and remaining-GB checks against the Atheris per-GB API.

environmentVariables.name: ATHERIS_PROXY_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Atheris pak_ access key (required for atheris_proxy_url and atheris_usage; atheris_stock works without it)
